name: meta-provider
summary: Typed accessor service for an existing post meta key.
description: Scaffolds a service class that wraps get_post_meta/update_post_meta/delete_post_meta for a single meta key. Autowired via the DI container.
problem: A post meta key already exists (registered via phpnomad/meta or used by WordPress) and you want consumers to access it through a typed service.
appliesWhen: The meta key already exists or is registered separately
You want a single class that owns read/write of the meta
Consumers should depend on this service via DI
avoidWhen: You want both registration and accessor — use phpnomad/attribute
The meta is on terms/users/comments — fork the template (this targets post meta)
tradeoffs: One service class. Class is concrete by default — extract an interface if you need to mock it.
outputs: A {name} service class at lib/Meta/{name}.php (autowired, no explicit binding required)
postApply: Add typed methods on top of get/set
Update defaultValue() to match the meta's expected shape
Inject {name} where consumers currently call get_post_meta()

metaKey.description: Post meta key this provider wraps

postType.description: Post type slug the meta belongs to (informational, used in the docblock)
